problem id: d547f717
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11100000 -> 00001110
  00101000 -> 00000010
  10010100 -> 00001001
  10100100 -> 00001010
  10001010 -> 00001000
  10011101 -> 10001001
  01100101 -> 10000110
  00001111 -> 10000000

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 00000000
